THIS ORDER IS TO OUTLINE THE INSPECTION AND INSTALLATION OF THE "WALL TO WALL" CARPETING.IT SHOULD BE COMPLETED BY APRIL 8, 2005.INSPECTION WILL OCCUR AT 10.30AM ON APRIL 27, 2005. FAILURE TO COMPLY TERMS OF THIS ORDER WILL RESULT CONTEMPT SANCTIONS AGAINST RESPONDENT.
